name: OAKLEY CAPITAL INV.LS-,01
summary: Oakley Capital Investments Limited is a Guernsey-based closed-ended investment company. The company's investment objective is to provide shareholders with consistent long-term capital appreciation by investing in companies across Europe, primarily in the business services, consumer, education, healthcare and technology sectors. Oakley Capital seeks to back entrepreneurs and partner with them to deliver transformational growth in their businesses.
